title: Nuclear TNT
description: Changes the texture of TNTs to nuclear bombs. This could be good for BedWars
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae30a21cf2af767c43e7ad320a188340a54cc17e.png)

This resourcepack will changes the texture and the name of "TNT" to "Nuclear TNT" as shown here:

Nuclear TNT:
![Nuclear TNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88a0d6f1b2a6d684dcc38426be0849c971ab74c5_0.webp)

Minecart with TNT:
![Minecart with TNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd10559396b6aec69a62c65a7a125de2fe1fff9_0.webp)

Minecart with Nuclear TNT item:
![Minecart with Nuclear TNT item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b8472a2e49528411fb1cb25fe3597a74e16b3d0_0.webp)
